step_rationale: Classical complement; genetic involvement in atherosclerotic plaque instability.
mechanism: C1S genetic variants amplify complement-driven vascular inflammation increasing atherosclerotic instability risk.

references.title: Multi-omics data integration from patients with carotid stenosis illuminates key molecular signatures of atherosclerotic instability.
Proteomic insights into the associations between obesity, lifestyle factors, and coronary artery disease.
